case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ROSA MARIA ANDRADE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ANDRADE, ROSA MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDRADE, ROSA MARIA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROSA MARIA ANDRADE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED JAN-13-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ANDRADE, ROSA MARIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
